info.description: Rest Services for managing the Configuration modeler.
info.summary: Rest Services for managing the Configuration modeler.
info.title: Configuration Rest Services.

post.summary: Service to unset the variant effectivities for a list of relationships.
post.description: Service to unset the variant effectivities for a list of relationships. <br> If unsetVariant service is executed under Work Under (Change Action) then it may lead to a new evolution of existing relationship. <br> The request will be rejected if the total number of relationships exceeds 10. <br> <br> Unset variant effectivity is supported for following Revision Modes: <br> Explicit ( when variant axis is activated on Item ) <br> Effectivity Based-Model <br> Effectivity Based <br>

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token can be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

parameters.name: DS-Change-Authoring-Context
parameters.description: Change Action physical id Ex: pid:DB4F8256517400005EEC5A6E000FEBBC

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in "HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication".

403.description: FORBIDDEN. The server understood the request, but is refusing to fulfill it. Authorization will not help and the request SHOULD NOT be repeated. If the request method was not HEAD and the server wishes to make public why the request has not been fulfilled, it SHOULD describe the reason for the refusal in the entity. If the server does not wish to make this information available to the client, the status code 404 (Not Found) can be used instead.

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

post.summary: Service to extend the existing effectivities on a list of relationships.
post.description: Service to extend the existing effectivities on a list of relationships. <br> The request will be rejected if the total number of relationships exceeds 10.<br><br>Please find below the list of possible error codes and error messages: <br>111 : This physical id is not valid. <br>199 : Failure detected during operation. <br><br><br>Please find below the list of possible warning codes and warning messages: <br>131 : The instance does not support effectivity expression. <br>132 : Extend operation is not possible on instance which is already available for all evolutions. <br><br> One of either Change Action (DS-Change-Authoring-Context) or Model Version (DS-Configuration-Authoring-Context) is mandatory in header. If none of them is there in input then the web service will throw exception.<br> <br> Extend effectivity is supported for following Revision Modes: <br> Effectivity Based-Model <br> Effectivity Based <br&gt

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token can be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

parameters.name: DS-Change-Authoring-Context
parameters.description: Change Action physical id Ex: pid:DB4F8256517400005EEC5A6E000FEBBC

parameters.name: DS-Configuration-Authoring-Context
parameters.description: The value of this attribute will be physicalid of a Model Version. For Example- pid:D7838256B22F010067BC100D000001F0

identifier.description: The physical id of a relationship.

warningCode.description: The value of this field will be a valid warning code. This field will be available in output only if extend operation is not possible on instance.

warningMessage.example: Extend operation is not possible on instance which is already available for all evolutions.
warningMessage.description: The value of this field will be a valid warning message. This field will be available in output only if extend operation is not possible on instance.

errorCode.description: The value of this field will be a valid error code. This field will be available in output only if extend operation failed.

errorMessage.example: This physical id is not valid.
errorMessage.description: The value of this field will be a valid error message. This field will be available in output only if extend operation failed.

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in "HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication".

403.description: FORBIDDEN. The server understood the request, but is refusing to fulfill it. Authorization will not help and the request SHOULD NOT be repeated. If the request method was not HEAD and the server wishes to make public why the request has not been fulfilled, it SHOULD describe the reason for the refusal in the entity. If the server does not wish to make this information available to the client, the status code 404 (Not Found) can be used instead.

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

post.summary: Service to set the effectivities evolution expression (XML) for a list of relationships.
post.description: Service to set the effectivities evolution expression (XML) for a list of relationships. <br> WARNING: Coherency between Evolution and Variant Expression are under users responsibility. <br> The request will be rejected if the total number of relationships exceeds 10. The number of relationships limit is only applicable for Cloud environment. This limit is not applicable for onPremise environment. <br><br> The web service will return the http 200 status code for success and all manageable failure cases. errorCode and errorMessage attributes will be present in the response payload if the set evolution effectivity failed for that relationship. errorMessage attribute in the response payload indicates the reason for set evolution effectivity failure. If the exception occurs then the web service will completely failed with 400 http status code. <br><br>Please find below the list of possible error codes and error messages: <br> 101 : Error while setting effectivity. <br>102 : The parent reference of the given instance does not have a Configuration Context. <br>106 : The input instance is controlled by a Change. Evolution effectivity cannot be edited. <br>117 : The input effectivity expression or data used in the expression is not correct. <br>118 : Instance's identifier in the input is not valid or correct. <br>119 : Effectivity cannot be set due to dictionary data. <br>120 : The criteria is not enabled on the parent reference. <br>121 : The root reference is a 3DPart which is not configurable. <br>122 : The root reference is XCAD controlled which is not configurable. <br>123 : Model provided in the input expression is not part of Configuration Context. <br>124 : Model provided in the input expression is not accessible or does not exist. <br>125 : Input expression not well-formatted (No model found). <br>126 : The criteria used in the input expression is not enabled on parent reference. <br>127 : Error occured during the save of the new effectivities. <br>128 : Error occured during the update of Configuration Revision effectivities. <br>129 : Effectivities cannot be set because changing at least one of them would impact frozen evolution range. <br>130 : The parent reference is not configurable. <br>199 : Failure detected during operation. <br> <br> Set evolution effectivity is supported for following Revision Modes: <br> Effectivity Based-Model <br> Effectivity Based <br&gt

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: CSRF token can be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

errorCode.description: The value of this field will be a valid error code. This field is available only if set evolution failed for at least one or all the input relationships. In case of set evolution success for all the input relationships then this field will not be available in output json.

message.example: The parent reference of the given instance does not have a Configuration Context.
message.description: The value of this field will be a valid NLS error message. This field is available only if set evolution failed for at least one or all the input relationships. In case of set evolution success for all the input relationships then this field will not be available in output json.

errorDetails.example: The reference : F6AF82561E5700005EB123650003C100 does not have a model attached.
errorDetails.description: The value of this field will be the details about the error. This field is available only if set evolution failed for at least one or all the input relationships. In case of set evolution success for all the input relationships then this field will not be available in output json.

identifier.description: The physical id of a relationship.

errorCode.description: The value of this field will be a valid error code. This field is available only if set evolution failed. In case of set evolution success then this field will not be available in output json.

errorMessage.description: The value of this field will be a valid error message. This field is available only if set evolution failed. In case of set evolution success then this field will not be available in output json.

post.summary: Service to get the effectivity expression for a list of relationships. (PUBLIC)
post.description: Service to get the effectivity expression for a list of relationships. <br><br>It allows to retrieve the effectivity expression for : <br>- Current Evolution Expression only <br>- Projected Evolution Expression only <br>- Variant Expression only <br>- both Current Evolution and Projected Evolution <br>- Current Evolution, Projected Evolution and Variant Expression <br><br>The web service will return the effectivity expressions in TXT or XML format. <br>If at least one of relationship's effectivity is corrupt or not readable then in that case get effectivity service will failed for all the input relationship's.<br>Warning : Engineering De-Activation domain effectivity is not supported by this web service. <br> <br> Get effectivities is supported for following Revision Modes: <br> Explicit ( when variant axis is activated on Item ) <br> Effectivity Based-Model <br> Effectivity Based <br&gt

id.description: The physical id of a relationship.

Effectivity_Current_Evolution.description: The value of this field will be the evolution effectivity expression for current view.

Effectivity_Projected_Evolution.description: The value of this field will be the evolution effectivity expression for projected view.

Effectivity_Variant.description: The value of this field will be the variant effectivity expression.

Effectivity_Format.description: The value of this field will be the format of effectivity expression.

hasEffectivity.description: This field indicates that relationship is having effectivity or not.

isFilterable.description: This field indicates that relationship is filterable or not.

errorDetails.example: Instance does not have effectivities for required domain's in input.
errorDetails.description: The value of this field will be error details. This is an optional field in output and it will be present in output if get effectivity failed.

post.summary: Service to set the effectivities variant expression (XML) for a list of relationships.
post.description: Service to set the effectivities variant expression (XML) for a list of relationships. <br> If setVariant service is executed under Work Under (Change Action) then it may lead to a new evolution of existing relationship. <br><br> WARNING: Coherency between Evolution and Variant Expression are under users responsibility. <br> The request will be rejected if the total number of relationships exceeds 1. The number of relationships limit is only applicable for Cloud environment. This limit is not applicable for onPremise environment. <br><br> The web service will return the http 200 status code for success and all manageable failure cases. errorCode and errorMessage attributes will be present in the response payload if the set variant effectivity failed for that relationship. errorMessage attribute in the response payload indicates the reason for set variant effectivity failure. If the exception occurs then the web service will completely failed with 400 http status code.<br><br>Please find below the list of possible error codes and error messages: <br> 101 : Error while setting effectivity. <br>102 : The parent reference of the given instance does not have a Configuration Context. <br>117 : The input effectivity expression or data used in the expression is not correct. <br>118 : Instance's identifier in the input is not valid or correct. <br>119 : Effectivity cannot be set due to dictionary data. <br>120 : The criteria is not enabled on the parent reference. <br>121 : The root reference is a 3DPart which is not configurable. <br>122 : The root reference is XCAD controlled which is not configurable. <br>123 : Model provided in the input expression is not part of Configuration Context. <br>124 : Model provided in the input expression is not accessible or does not exist. <br>125 : Input expression not well-formatted (No model found). <br>126 : The criteria used in the input expression is not enabled on parent reference. <br>127 : Error occured during the save of the new effectivities. <br>128 : Error occured during the update of Configuration Revision effectivities. <br>129 : Effectivities cannot be set because changing at least one of them would impact frozen evolution range. <br>130 : The parent reference is not configurable. <br>199 : Failure detected during operation. <br> <br> <br> Set variant effectivity is supported for following Revision Modes: <br> Explicit ( when variant axis is activated on Item ) <br> Effectivity Based-Model <br> Effectivity Based <br&gt

identifier.description: The physical id of a relationship to unset effectivity.
The physical id of a relationship to extend Effectivity.
The physical id of a model.
The physical id of a relationship to set evolution effectivity.

evolutionContent.example: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><CfgEffectivityExpression  xmlns="urn:com:dassault_systemes:config" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="urn:com:dassault_systemes:config CfgEffectivityExpression.xsd"><Expression><Context HolderType="Model" HolderName="Aircraft"><TreeSeries Type = "ProductState" Name = "Aircraft"><Tree><Root Name = "Aircraft" Revision = "A"/></Tree></TreeSeries></Context></Expression></CfgEffectivityExpression>
evolutionContent.description: The evolution effectivity expression in XML format.

items.description: This is a mandatory attribute in input. The value of this attribute is a list of physical ids of relationship.

domain.description: Domain is used to filter the effectivity information. This is an optional attribute in input. Valid values for domain are EVOLUTION, VARIANT, ALL. Default value of this attribute is ALL. <br>EVOLUTION : The web service returns the effectivity expression for EVOLUTION domain. <br>VARIANT   : The web service returns the effectivity expression for VARIANT domain. <br>ALL       : The web service returns the effectivity expression for EVOLUTION and VARIANT domain. <br>

view.description: View is used to filter the effectivity information. This is an optional attribute in input. Valid values for view are CURRENT, PROJECTED, ALL. Default value of this attribute is ALL. <br>CURRENT   : The web service returns the effectivity expression for CURRENT view. <br>PROJECTED : The web service returns the effectivity expression for PROJECTED view. <br>ALL       : The web service returns the effectivity expression for both views CURRENT and PROJECTED. <br>

format.description: Format is used to define how effectivity expressions are returned in response. This is an optional attribute in input. Valid values for format are TXT, XML. Default value of this attribute is TXT. <br>TXT : The web service returns the effectivity expression in TXT format. <br>XML : The web service returns the effectivity expression in XML format. <br>

identifier.description: The physical id of a relationship to unset effectivity.
The physical id of a model.
The physical id of a relationship to set variant effectivity.

variantContent.example: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><CfgEffectivityExpression xs:schemaLocation = "urn:com:dassault_systemes:config CfgEffectivityExpression.xsd" xmlns:xs = "http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns = "urn:com:dassault_systemes:config"><Expression><Context HolderType = "Model" HolderName = "Aircraft"><Feature Type="ConfigFeature" Name="Color"><Feature Type="ConfigFeature" Name="Red"/></Feature></Context></Expression></CfgEffectivityExpression>
variantContent.description: The variant effectivity expression in XML format.

effectivityContent.description: Get the effectivity expression on instance.

hasEffectivity.description: Check if the Instance or Relationship is having effectivity on it or not.

hasChange.description: Check if the Change Action or Work Under Change is available.

enabledCriteria.description: Get the list of Enabled Criteria on Configured Object

isConfigured.description: Check if the object is Configured or not

effectivityContent.description: Get the effectivity expression on instance.
Get the effectivity expression on instance.

enabledCriteria.description: Get the list of Enabled Criteria on Configured Object
Get the list of Enabled Criteria on Configured Object
